channel.title: Marine Coders
channel.description: Marine Coders is a community of Marine Corps stakeholders, active duty, reserve, retired, civilian, etc., that are interested in improving the force through software development.

item.title: New Marine Coders Website
item.author: william.crum
item.description:

item.title: NDAA
